content.en:
"In a short period of time, that extra-dimensional force should not come to harvest the super-dimensional origin bead, but maybe, at the moment, we must know which force the other party is. "

Next, Ye Tian investigated according to the mark.

Soon, he found out.

【Six-winged Family】

The six-winged family is a family of six-winged golden birds, and it can be said that it is relatively powerful in the territory of the six thousand, it is said that there are dozens of powerhouses in the super-dimensional realm alone, and there are even more in the half-step super-dimensional realm, and the peak realm gods don't know how many.

This family is much stronger than the Tianyang family, not only occupying an extradimensional realm, but also owning a lot of hole cards in other realms.

In the territory of the Six Thousand, the Six-Winged Family can definitely be ranked among the top twenty.

"The Six-Winged Family is too powerful, there is no hope at all for a head-on confrontation, no wonder the Six-Winged Family is attacking one by one beyond the "220" dimensional realm, and other forces dare not interfere, not even the Garan Chamber of Commerce. "

Ye Tian frowned.

However, in terms of strength, the Garan Chamber of Commerce is more powerful, because the Garan Chamber of Commerce has more extradimensional realms, but the Six-Winged Family is a family, all of them are members of the same clan, and their power is concentrated, while the Garan Chamber of Commerce is more chaotic and divided into multiple factions.

Therefore, even if the overall strength of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is stronger, it does not dare to offend the Six-Winged Family.

"I have to become a super-dimensional realm, as long as I become a super-dimensional realm, the six-winged family should also give face, and will not attack the eternal realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

He also has a way, that is, to directly transfer the Terrans, transfer the Terrans to other extradimensional realms, and completely abandon the eternal realm.

But that's not the case yet!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out the three super-dimensional origin beads and began to use these three super-dimensional origin beads for refining.

After a relatively long period of time had passed, these three superdimensional origin beads had already been refined by Ye Tian, and he had also completed four percent of the progress of the superdimensional body.

And his physical body is stronger, and his strength has also improved.

"If you give it to those ordinary extra-dimensional realms, maybe these few extra-dimensional origin beads can help them complete most of the extra-dimensional body refinement. Ye Tian thought so.

Right now, he still needs more extradimensional origin beads.

According to the complete information of the Sky Pavilion, there was a lot of information about the extra-dimensional realm being arranged to harvest the super-dimensional origin beads, but those places were guarded by strong people, and if he dared to rob them, he would undoubtedly be looking for death.

Moreover, once the Extradimensional Origin Bead is born there, it will be harvested away in a short period of time.

Other than that.

He could also set up a formation to harvest the Extradimensional Origin Beads, but it took too long, and he didn't have time to wait that long.

In a short period of time, he could no longer obtain the Extradimensional Origin Bead, but there was hope for the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead.

Many extra-dimensional forces have their own treasure lands for cultivating the Immortal Golden Marrow Beads, or some of the treasure lands that can give birth to the Immortal Golden Marrow Beads have been jointly controlled by many forces.

But there are still some areas that cannot be controlled.

For example, Dragon Cave Ridge, this place has not yet been completely controlled by those extradimensional forces.

Dragon Cave Ridge is located in a Death Void Land in the 6000th Territory, and the reason why it is not controlled by extradimensional forces is because it is extremely difficult to enter Dragon Cave Ridge.

Once the powerhouses of the extra-dimensional realm get close to the Dragon Cave Ridge, they will be targeted by a large number of extra-dimensional realm creatures, and for a long time, the major forces have not found a safe route to the Dragon Cave Ridge.

On the contrary, it was the peak realm divine cultivator who had a certain hope of entering the Dragon Cave Ridge, but the peak realm divine cultivator could not survive in the Dragon Cave Ridge at all.

As for the half-step extradimensional realm, there is also a little hope of entering the Dragon Cave Ridge, but among the ten half-step extradimensional realms, probably only one will not be targeted by the superdimensional realm creatures, and the others will be killed.

And after entering the Dragon Cave Ridge, it is also very dangerous, even if you really find something good and come out of it, you may not be able to come out alive!

The probability of entering alive is 1 in 10, and the probability of coming out alive is also 1 in 10, and the probability of these two together is extremely low.

For a long time, it was too rare to be able to successfully enter the Dragon Cave Ridge and come out alive in a half-step transcendent realm, even some strong people with a half-step transcendent realm clone would not dare to do so.

However, in countless extradimensional eras, there are still a lot of half-step extradimensional realms that have come out of the Dragon Cave Ridge alive, so the outside world also has a little understanding of the situation in the Dragon Cave Ridge.

And there are immortal golden pith beads in the Dragon Cave Ridge, as well as immortal golden pith beads, and there seem to be a lot.

But the half-step extradimensional realm did not dare to venture into the Dragon Cave Ridge for the sake of these immortal golden pith and immortal golden pith beads, and the secret that the Dragon Cave Ridge really attracted some half-step extradimensional realms to enter was something else.

The information given by the Sky Seeping Pavilion was limited to the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead and the Extradimensional Origin Bead, so naturally he would not tell the information of the Dragon Cave Ridge, unless he purchased the information of the Dragon Cave Ridge.

However, in a short period of time, Ye Tian would not go to the Heavenly Pavilion again.

"No matter what good things are in the Dragon Cave Ridge, my current goal is the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead!"

Ye Tian's replica body in the Extreme Yang Realm immediately went to the Dragon Cave Ridge.

He was not afraid of falling, and if he continued to try once he failed, he did not believe that he could not enter the Dragon Cave Ridge. []

If he can find a lot of immortal golden marrow beads in Dragon Cave Ridge, he will practice in Dragon Cave Ridge and refine his superdimensional body, so he is afraid that he will fall when he comes out, resulting in the loss of immortal golden marrow beads.

......

In an area outside the Dragon Cave Ridge, this is almost a forbidden area of the extradimensional realm.

And Ye Tian came to this forbidden area, and there was no forbidden area.

He first condensed a replica body, and then let the replica body enter.

Swish!

Ye Tian's flying speed is not fast, and he is always checking the information around him, and he also uses his copying talent to spy around to avoid contact with those extradimensional creatures of 0.1.

However, he is still a powerhouse of the extradimensional realm.

Even if he had a copy of the body, he would not be able to spy on the other party's arrival.

He saw an inexplicable force descending, and in the dark, he saw a pair of blood-colored eyes projected from a distance.

The next moment, his body was entwined with countless blood-colored lights.

Bang!

This replica body was directly strangled by the blood-colored light.

"The replica body was killed!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

His current strength is also the top in the half-step transcendent realm, but he was instantly killed by the other party, without a trace of resistance.

Obviously, the other party is a superdimensional creature in the extradimensional realm, and in the face of this existence, he has no ability to resist at all.
